ksa_text: Skill in provisioning and configuring cloud platform data services, including compute resources, managed databases, object storage, and analytics services, with attention to cost optimization and security configuration.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("object storage", "cloud data", "data service"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4254, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in DE job postings or cert curricula (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Would a working Data Engineer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the technical practice is implicit in DE work (domain affinity 0.82, 3 DE signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate DE competencies.
